_description: Signals verified via TWO independent methods on 2026-04-20: (1) direct browser navigation to the company website, (2) Google News search for corroborating press coverage. Both sources are cited per entry. When generate_sample_data.py runs, these overrides replace curated values and add a verification note.
_verification_methods: Live browser navigation (Claude-in-Chrome) — actual HTTP response, redirects, page content
Google News cross-check — independent multi-source press confirmation

Humane.verified_note: VERIFIED 2026-04-20 · site: humane.com → hp-iq.com (HP AI orchestrator) · news: HP acquired Humane Feb 18, 2025 for $116M (raised $240M), AI Pin discontinued — sources: NYT, Verge, Fortune, Bloomberg/Yahoo, CNBC, TechCrunch

Inflection AI.verified_note: VERIFIED 2026-04-20 · site: up, pitching Pi + enterprise API · news: $650M MSFT licensing deal Mar 2024; founders/most staff joined Microsoft; FTC/UK CMA/German FCO all reviewed; Pi added usage caps Aug 2024; CEO said Nov 2024 they're 'done trying to make next-generation AI models' — sources: Fortune, Reuters, TechCrunch, Quartz

Adept.verified_note: VERIFIED 2026-04-20 · site: up, enterprise pitch preserved, no careers · news: Amazon reverse-acquihire June 2024 (raised $400M total); investors reportedly repaid; David Luan (Adept founder, headed Amazon AGI Lab) then left Amazon March 2026 — sources: TechCrunch, Verge, Semafor, GeekWire, CNBC

Codeium.verified_note: VERIFIED 2026-04-20 · site: codeium.com → windsurf.com, blog post Apr 6 2026, hiring · NEWS CORRECTION: OpenAI $3B acquisition fell through (Apr 2025), Google DeepMind instead paid $2.4B to acquihire CEO Varun Mohan + co-founder + top researchers (Jul 2025), Cognition AI acquired the remainder — brand is alive but founding team is gone (same pattern as Inflection/Adept). Reclassify as Pivoted, not Thriving — sources: CNBC, Bloomberg, Fast Company, Neowin, Klover.ai
